relevant-experience.title: Software Developer
experience: Investigated and resolved production issues for a maritime software handling $7B in annual revenue, using Visual Studio to identify and fix legacy runtime errors.

Translated complex maritime regulations and customer specifications into 50+ custom C# fee configurations and optimized 100+ existing modules, ensuring precise billing logic and automated data validation.

relevant-experience.title: Software Developer (Contract)

Spearheaded the definition and implementation of functional requirements and technical contracts with the client, ensuring the architectural design aligned with business goals.

projects.name: Auto Parts SaaS

15+ modules sharing a consistent inline panel + DataTable architecture.
